message:
test(cli): add 25 tests for ValidateModelAlias, ResolveModel, expandPromptTemplate (bd-327kd)

Cover ValidateModelAlias with config (13.3%→100%): known aliases, unknown
aliases for all agent types, nil aliases, nil config, unknown agent type.
Cover ResolveModel with config (82.4%→94.1%): alias resolution, defaults,
passthrough. Cover expandPromptTemplate (73.3%→100%): impl, review, custom
with file, custom with missing file, custom without file, case insensitivity.
Also add AgentSpecs.String() and agentSpecsValue tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
